theme_archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) + Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) - Light Theme
design_philosophy: A world-class AI video assessment page for pediatric wellness (Kiddo+). White/cream backgrounds with soft pastel accents. Friendly, warm, clinical-yet-trustworthy. Generous whitespace, rounded-3xl cards, soft shadows. No dark tech gradients. Apple + Headspace + Google Material design language.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-800
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-800
hierarchy.labels: text-xs sm:text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500

typography.notes: Avoid generic Inter. Use Nunito for a friendly, approachable, child-focused feel. DM Sans for highly readable body text.

hero.layout: Two-column bento style or 60/40 split. Left: Heading, subtext, main CTA. Right: Warm family imagery overlaid with subtle AI UI hints.
hero.instructions: Use gradient_pastel for the background. Ensure the CTA button is highly rounded (rounded-full) and uses the brand primary color with a soft glow. Add emoji sparingly.

trust_bar.layout: Flex row, wrap on mobile, evenly spaced.
trust_bar.instructions: Include 5 items: Privacy First, AI Powered, Therapist Guided, Videos Auto Deleted, Report in Minutes. Use Lucide icons matching brand colors.

process_timeline.layout: Horizontal scrolling or wrapping flex container with 5 steps.
process_timeline.instructions: Use Framer Motion to stagger the appearance of each step. Connect steps with a dashed line (SVG or border). Use soft rounded numbering.

video_upload.instructions: Implement drag-and-drop state. Support MP4/MOV/WEBM, max 50MB. Show progress bar on upload, then video preview with replace/delete options. Add a lock icon to reinforce security.

domain_cards.instructions: Each card must use its specific domain color for accents (icons, borders). Default state: Title + short desc. Expanded state: Why, How, Examples, Avoid, Duration, and a dedicated upload area. Use Shadcn Accordion logic or Framer Motion AnimatePresence.

recording_tips.layout: Side-by-side Do and Don't columns inside a rounded-3xl card.
recording_tips.instructions: Use 'success_light' bg for Do, 'danger_light' bg for Don't. Use friendly checkmarks and crosses. Generous p-8 padding.

ai_analysis_visualizer.layout: Relative container with the 'child playing' image as the base video frame.
ai_analysis_visualizer.instructions: Overlay a privacy face mask (blur or soft geometric shape) on the child. Overlay an SVG animated skeleton (using Framer Motion) mapping joints. Add floating labels connected to the skeleton: 'Pose Estimation', 'Movement Analysis', 'Hand Tracking', 'Behaviour Detection', 'Joint Attention', 'Eye Gaze', 'Interaction Mapping', 'Motor Pattern', 'Temporal Behaviour', 'Social Engagement'. Must feel premium.

privacy_section.layout: Centered layout with green security shield icons.
privacy_section.instructions: Reiterate that videos are auto-deleted, encrypted, and privacy is priority. Background can be a very soft mint green.

report_preview.layout: Bento box style mockup of a report.
report_preview.instructions: Show a large overall score, horizontal bar charts for the 8 domains, and sections for strengths/recommendations. Include a 'Download PDF' button.

faq.instructions: Remove borders, use soft gray/white backgrounds for accordion items, rounded-2xl padding.

hero_family_recording.description: Happy family on a couch, use as hero visual representing home environment. Apply soft rounded mask/border.

ai_analysis_sample_frame.description: Child playing on the floor. Use this as the background 'video frame' for the AI Analysis Visualizer.

pediatric_therapy_trust.description: Therapist giving high five. Use in the Trust/About section to reinforce clinical backing.

animations.skeleton_svg: Use Framer Motion <motion.path> with initial={{ pathLength: 0 }} animate={{ pathLength: 1 }}. For joints, use pulsing <motion.circle>. Map to head, shoulders, elbows, wrists, spine, hips, knees, ankles.
animations.stagger_cards: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, show: { opacity: 1, y: 0, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}
animations.page_load: Smooth fade in with upward drift for main elements.
animations.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (y: -4px) and shadow increases. Buttons scale to 1.05 on hover, 0.95 on tap.

testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-video-zone', data-testid='faq-accordion-item', data-testid='domain-card-expand').
